title: Too Many Trims
description: If 16 Armor Trims is not enough, here's 20+ more!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wqDho3sK-H4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/77/too_many_trims.png)

Too Many Trims adds 20+ new Armor Trims to the game. They can be found in many places, including other Dimensions.

![Base Too Many Trims](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/79/2024-11-27_16.png)

Curseforge page is [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/too-many-trims~~~~)

# Trim Locations

Townsfolk Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/85/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/48 Village chests from any type of Village, or you can get it from Master level Armorers. You also have a 1/14 chance of finding it in Trimmed Vaults. (1.21.4 only)



Forger Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/86/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/4 Village Armorer/Toolsmith chests and in 1/8 Village Weaponsmith chests, or you can get it from Master level Armorers, Toolsmiths, and Weaponsmiths.



Priest Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/87/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Village Cleric chests, or you can get it from Master level Clerics.



Butchering Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/88/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Village Butcher chests, or you can get it from Master level Butchers.



Mapmaker Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/89/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/12 Village Cartographer chests, or you can get it from Master level Cartographers.



Caster Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/90/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Village Fisher chests, or you can get it from Master level Fishermen.



Archer Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/91/2024-11-27_16.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Village Fletcher chests, or you can get it from Master level Fletchers.



Stonecut Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/93/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Village Mason chests, or you can get it from Master level Masons.



Herder Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/94/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Village Shepherd chests, or you can get it from Master level Shepherds.



Experiment Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/95/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/3 Igloo chests.



Servant Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/96/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/2 Woodland Mansion chests.



Ravage Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/97/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim has a 1/10 chance of dropping from Ravagers.



Coven Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/98/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim has a 1/38 chance of dropping from Witches, increasing by +1% per level of Looting.



Spawner Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/99/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/9 Monster Room chests.



Miner Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/100/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/14 Mineshaft chest minecarts.



X-mark Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/101/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/3 Buried Treasure chests.



Atlantis Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/102/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/16 Cold Ocean Ruins Suspicious Gravel or in 1/16 Warm Ocean Ruins Suspicious Sand.



Gateway Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/103/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim can be found in 1/6 Ruined Portal chests.



Inferno Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/104/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim has a 1/200 chance of dropping from Blazes, increasing by +0.25% per level of Looting.



Hunter Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/105/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim has a 1/154 chance of being given to you after a Piglin Barters.



Brutal Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/106/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim has a 1/17 chance of dropping from Piglin Brutes.



Dragonborn Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1027/107/2024-11-27_17.png)

This trim has a 1/2 chance of dropping from the Ender Dragon.

# Exclusive Trims
These are only available in the Neoforge 1.21.4 version.



![1.21.4 Trims](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1155/128/4-png.png)


Wanderer Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1127/864/minecraft-neoforge_-1-21-4-singleplayer-3_15_2025.png)

Wandering Traders will offer this Armor Trim rarely, or it can be found in 1/14 Trimmed Vaults.



Challenger Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1127/865/minecraft-neoforge_-1-21-4-singleplayer-3_15_2025.png)

This trim has a 1/16 chance of being found in Trial Chamber Corridor Barrels, a 1/6 chance in Trial Chambers intersection Barrels, and a 1/4 chance of being found in Trial Chambers Intersection chests. Mobs that spawn with armor during Ominous Trials may be wearing this trim.



Verticality Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1127/866/minecraft-neoforge_-1-21-4-singleplayer-3_15_2025.png)

This trim has a 5/356 chance of being found in Trial Chamber Pots. It has the same chance of spawning as the Creator Music Box disc. Mobs that spawn with armor during Ominous Trials may be wearing this trim.



Typhoon Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1127/867/minecraft-neoforge_-1-21-4-singleplayer-3_15_2025.png)

This trim has a 1/200 chance of dropping from Breezes, increasing by +0.25% per level of Looting.



Smashed Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1127/868/minecraft-neoforge_-1-21-4-singleplayer-3_15_2025.png)

This trim can only be obtained by Smashing a Warden with a Mace.



Scopophobia Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1127/869/minecraft-neoforge_-1-21-4-singleplayer-3_15_2025.png)

This trim has a 1/10 chance of dropping from a Creaking Heart. The Heart has to be natural for it to drop and Silk Touch does not stop the trim from dropping.



Valor Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1155/125/1-png.png)

This trim has a 3/14 chance of dropping from a Trimmed Vault.



Intrepidity Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1155/126/2-png.png)

This trim has a 3/14 chance of dropping from a Trimmed Vault.



Bravery Armor Trim:

![Trim](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1155/127/3-png.png)

This trim has a 3/14 chance of dropping from a Trimmed Vault.





Extra Content:

Trimmed Prison:

![The Trimmed Prison](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1155/129/5-png.png)

This is an uncommon structure found in the Overworld. It can be located by getting a map from the Trial Chambers. There are many rooms in this structure with Trial Spawners and Vaults. A Trimmed Vault and Trimmed Golem Spawn in the center of the dungeon.



Tourmaline:

 -This rare ore can be obtained from killing a Trimmed Golem or opening a Trimmed Prison Vault. They come in 3 colors and are used for trims.



Trimmed Vault Key:

 -This item is found rarely in Ominous Prison Vaults. It unlocks the Trimmed Vault and allows it to give another trim.



Trimmed Vault:

 -This block is found in Trimmed Prisons and can be right-clicked to obtain a trim. The vault can be reset with a Trimmed Vault Key.



 Smithstone:

 -A black stone found in the Trimmed Prison. It can be trimmed with a special template



Trimmed Golem:

 -This large golem mob is found in the Trimmed Prison. It can be awakened be inserting an Emerald into the Engraved Smithstone in front of it. It drops a random Tourmaline when defeated.



Music Disc:

 -There is a special music disc found in the Trimmed Prison.



Spawner Scraps can be obtained from Monster Spawners and are used to Duplicate the Spawner Armor Trim and as a Trim Material.



Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
